# 720 Closed Lists

## Content Type (`contentType`)
- `Instruction`: הבנייה
- `Practice`: תרגול
- `Inquiry or Project Task`: פרויקט או משימת חקר
- `Educational Game`: משחק לימודי
- `Text Reading`: ניתוח טקסט
- `Simulation`: סימולציה
- `Motivational`: פריט מוטיבציוני
- `Solved Exercise`: פתרון מודרך של תרגיל
- `Summary`: סיכום

## Mastery Level (`masteryLevel`)
- `basic`: בסיסי
- `intermediate`: ממוצע
- `advanced`: מתקדם

Do not reveal mastery labels to learners.

## Question Type (`questionType`)
- `fill-in`: short free-text answer.
- `true-false`: true/false.
- `choice`: one or more choices.
- `numeric`: numeric answer.
- `sequencing`: order items.
- `matching`: match source items to target items.
- `other`: any other question type.

## Media Format (`mediaFormat`)
- `Text`
- `Image`
- `Audio`
- `Video`
- `Animation`
- `Interactive content`

## Languages
- `Hebrew`
- `Arabic`
- `English`

## Lists Still Owned by MoE Indexes
- Sectors.
- Audiences.
- Sub-topics.
- Learning objectives.
- Depth levels.
- Subject cognitive levels.
- Skills indexes.

When a closed MoE index is missing from the repo, keep a placeholder and create a work item to import the official list rather than inventing values.
